title: Tintable vector icons
description: When enabled, every vector (SVG) imageset is marked as a template image (template-rendering-intent = template), so icons adopt the current tint / foreground color in SwiftUI and UIKit. Turn this off if your icon set is multicolor and must keep its original colors. Raster (PNG) assets are never affected.

title: Ignored asset paths
description: Asset paths to exclude from the export. If you include partial path fragments, all matching paths are ignored (e.g. `deprecated` ignores everything under a `deprecated/` group and its subgroups).
